allow: Bash(sed -i 's/import { Inter } from "next\\/font\\/google";/import { Cormorant, DM_Sans } from "next\\/font\\/google";/' src/app/layout.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/const inter = Inter\({ subsets: \\["latin"\\] }\);/const cormorant = Cormorant\({ subsets: ["latin"], variable: "--font-cormorant", weight: ["300","400","500","600","700"], style: ["normal","italic"], display: "swap" }\);\\nconst dmSans = DM_Sans\({ subsets: ["latin"], variable: "--font-dm-sans", display: "swap" }\);/' src/app/layout.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className={inter.className + " flex flex-col min-h-screen"}/className={`${dmSans.className} flex flex-col min-h-screen antialiased`}/' src/app/layout.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/import { Cormorant, DM_Sans } from "next\\/font\\/google";/import { Instrument_Serif, DM_Sans } from "next\\/font\\/google";/' src/app/layout.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/const cormorant = Cormorant.*$/const instrumentSerif = Instrument_Serif\({ subsets: ["latin"], variable: "--font-cormorant", weight: "400", style: ["normal","italic"], display: "swap" }\);/' src/app/layout.tsx)

Bash(sed -i 's/font-display text-\\[clamp\(2\\.8rem,6\\.5vw,5\\.2rem\)\\] font-light leading-\\[1\\.06\\] tracking-tight/font-display text-[clamp\(2.6rem,6vw,4.8rem\)] leading-[1.08]/g' src/app/HomePageClient.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/font-display text-\\[clamp\(2rem,3\\.5vw,3\\.2rem\)\\] font-light leading-tight/font-display text-[clamp\(1.9rem,3.2vw,3rem\)] leading-tight/g' src/app/HomePageClient.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/font-display text-\\[clamp\(1\\.8rem,3\\.5vw,3rem\)\\] font-light text-stone-900/font-display text-[clamp\(1.7rem,3.2vw,2.8rem\)] text-stone-900/g' src/app/HomePageClient.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/font-display text-\\[clamp\(2rem,5vw,4rem\)\\] font-light leading-tight/font-display text-[clamp\(1.9rem,4.5vw,3.8rem\)] leading-tight/g' src/app/HomePageClient.tsx)
